headline: AbbVie Beats Earnings Estimates, Boosts 2026 Outlook. What It Means for the Stock.
summary: AbbVie  stock rose Wednesday after the pharmaceutical company reported better-than-expected quarterly earnings.  AbbVie  lifted its guidance for adjusted per-share earnings in 2026 to between $14.08 and $14.28, from a previous range of $13.96 to $14.16.  Shares of AbbVie jumped 2.5% to $202.63 in premarket trading.

Shares of AbbVie jumped 2.5% to $202.63 in premarket trading.
